title: Including boards automatically to dashboard
excerpt:
From dashboard section, I can see only 20 boards included on my chart. I have more than 40 boards on my workspace. I want to include all in one shot and automatically to be included new ones too

posts.author: yosihatem (Yosi Hatem)
posts.cookedHtml:
From dashboard section, I can see only 20 boards included on my chart. I have more than 40 boards on my workspace. I want to include all in one shot and automatically to be included new ones too
After contacting with support, this is possible only manually
